question: This is placeholder content for Beginner Level 1 — what should replace this question bank?
options: The real Level 1 syllabus, once the course Excel sheet is provided
answer: The real Level 1 syllabus, once the course Excel sheet is provided
explanation: This whole file is a placeholder so the Level 1 class experience (home screen, topics, practice/exam modes, weekly quiz) can be tested end-to-end. Once the instructor shares the Level 1 course content (Excel sheet), this will be replaced with real topics and questions, built the same way data/l2/questions.json was.
hint2: It was mentioned earlier in this conversation.
hint3: It's a spreadsheet with course content.

question: True or False: Level 1 and Level 2 students have completely separate progress, question banks, and weekly quizzes.
explanation: Each class has its own data files and its own progress tracking, even though both run on the same site and the same Supabase backend.
hint1: They're two different classes taught separately.
hint2: Think about how the site is structured now.
